ai Ready

result

Live production site — use it as your proof of concept

Every technical decision on this site — schema architecture, AI crawler access, FAQ structure, keyword targeting — is an SEO asset built to rank. Your listing can have the same infrastructure.

What We Build

Services & Pricing

AI-Powered Listing Sites

From $3,500

  • ✦ Single-property Astro site — 100 PageSpeed score
  • ✦ Full SEO schema (JSON-LD, FAQPage, LodgingBusiness)
  • ✦ AI crawler optimization (llms.txt, robots.txt)
  • ✦ Google AI Overview–ready FAQ architecture
  • ✦ Deployed to Cloudflare — global CDN, zero lag
  • ✦ Cinematic hero, gallery, video tour integration
Get Started

Real Estate SEO Package

From $1,500/mo

  • ✦ Beverly Hills luxury keyword domination strategy
  • ✦ Monthly market report (backlink-bait content)
  • ✦ Google Business Profile build & optimization
  • ✦ Schema markup audit + implementation
  • ✦ AI search visibility (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini)
  • ✦ Monthly ranking report with competitor tracking
Get Started

Full Agency Retainer

Custom

  • ✦ Everything in both packages above
  • ✦ Ongoing site updates + new listing pages
  • ✦ Instagram DM outreach templates + targeting
  • ✦ Zillow/Realtor.com listing optimization
  • ✦ Email sequences for buyer & tenant leads
  • ✦ Priority support — 24-hr response SLA

45%

of Google searches now show AI Overviews — above all organic results

click reduction when AI answers appear — your site needs to be the cited source

6.5×

more likely to be cited via structured data + FAQ schema than plain pages

100

PageSpeed score on this site — most real estate sites score under 50
